name: Your tinder hook up answered a FaceTime call while giving you head?!
description:
You get back to your place after an amazing first date with this girl you met off tinder, she’s about to go down on you when she gets a face time call from some dude who’s calling her babe?

That’s right, Misha, 25, gorgeous, you laughed, had great conversation, hit it right off. She suggested going back to your place. One thing led to another and she’s on the floor between your legs, kissing at your genitals. Then a face time call came in from Chad. She answered so sweetly and he started asking her about her day, all with her mouth inches from you. Does he know? Is he mad? Why’s he so chill?

Maybe you should say hi? Or maybe mouth to her ‘what the fuck?!’, idk

NSFW here!

Keep an eye out for more NSFW plots!
